title: Living Cornerstone gets nod from Celebrate Sedgefield
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS -  The Living Cornerstone was honoured in the Charity and Community category at the Celebrate Sedgefield Awards Ceremony last Friday.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Living Cornerstone was honoured in the Charity and Community category at the Celebrate Sedgefield Awards Ceremony last Friday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event was hosted at the Pine Lake Lifestyle Estate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Established by the Sedgefield Ratepayers and Residents Association, the Celebrate Sedgefield Awards aim to shine a spotlight on individuals and groups who tirelessly contribute to the lifeblood of the community - often working quietly without expectation of acknowledgment.","html":"Established by the Sedgefield Ratepayers and Residents Association, the Celebrate Sedgefield Awards aim to shine a spotlight on individuals and groups who tirelessly contribute to the lifeblood of the community - often working quietly without expectation of acknowledgment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to one of its members, The Living Cornerstone was founded in 2008 in response to the growing need for specialised, compassionate care for dementia sufferers in Sedgefield.","html":"According to one of its members, The Living Cornerstone was founded in 2008 in response to the growing need for specialised, compassionate care for dementia sufferers in Sedgefield."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Since then, it has expanded and evolved, offering a safe, nurturing environment where residents receive attentive and personalised support.","html":"Since then, it has expanded and evolved, offering a safe, nurturing environment where residents receive attentive and personalised support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisation's commitment to excellence is reflected in its focus on specialised staff training and in the warm, loving atmosphere that surrounds its residents.","html":"The organisation's commitment to excellence is reflected in its focus on specialised staff training and in the warm, loving atmosphere that surrounds its residents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Living Cornerstone gets nod from Celebrate Sedgefield
